details.reason: Activity 'com.bskyb.android.skyplus.activity.GenreListActivity' has an intent-filter but no explicit android:exported attribute. On API < 31 this defaults to exported=true. No permission guard found — potentially accessible by any app.

details.reason: Activity 'com.bskyb.android.skyplus.activity.GenreListActivity' registers the custom URI scheme 'skyplus://' without a permission guard. Any app can trigger this activity by crafting an Intent with a matching URI.
